body.title: Add tests/test_twm_context.py to _PREFLIGHT_IGNORE in tools/ops.py
body.result: Already shipped via commit 92749474. tests/test_twm_context.py is in _PREFLIGHT_IGNORE at wild_igor/igor/tools/ops.py:1241-1243 with the exact Ollama-prompt-eval-count rationale comment described in the ticket.

cert_meta.expected_diff: +3 lines (1 list entry + 2 comment lines) to wild_igor/igor/tools/ops.py around the _PREFLIGHT_IGNORE = [ block

body.description:
Pre-flight check is showing transient false-alarm blocks on tests/test_twm_context.py. Behavior: the file's tests skip cleanly when Ollama is fully unavailable, but transiently fail with 'assertGreater 0 > 0' when Ollama is reachable yet returns no prompt_eval_count. To prevent false-alarm pre-flight blocks, add 'tests/test_twm_context.py' to the _PREFLIGHT_IGNORE list in wild_igor/igor/tools/ops.py with a 2-line comment explaining the Ollama-prompt-eval-count edge case.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/ops.py (single file)
**Design rules:** test-plan-or-why-not — no new test needed; the change is a list append in an existing ignore list, behavior is 'this file no longer fails pre-flight'
**Scope boundary:** IN — single list-append entry + 2-line comment in _PREFLIGHT_IGNORE. OUT — investigating WHY Ollama returns no prompt_eval_count (separate concern); adding any new tests; touching any other file.
**Test plan:** After edit, the _PREFLIGHT_IGNORE list contains 'tests/test_twm_context.py'. No new unit tests required (list append behavior is verified by absence of pre-flight false-alarm in subsequent runs).
